title: Final Coyote vs. Acme trailer drops at SDCC
summary: Acme , and the full trailer for director Zach Cregger’s fresh take on Resident Evil . The studio showed the first teaser for Cregger’s Resident Evil during CinemaCon in April and dropped the full trailer today at SDCC.
